regional_cost_note: Pool builders in Auckland typically quote $36,000–$75,000 for a fibreglass pool installed and $52,000–$130,000+ for a concrete/gunite pool. Above-ground pools start from $3,500. Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. Building consent is required for most in-ground pools in NZ — confirm your builder handles consent and fencing compliance.
